message.content:
@startuml

class ItemViews {
  create_item()
  get_item()
  catalog()
  get_category()
  submit_offer()
  search()
  get_all_sales()
  get_sale()
}

class UserViews {
  frontpage()
  register()
  profile()
  update_profile()
}

class MessagingViews {
  send_message()
  get_all_messages()
  get_message()
}

note right of ItemViews
  All sales for the logged in user
  Both where he is buyer and seller.
end note

@enduml
